name: zagn8n Bank vs ZagChain AI Generator

parameters.content:
## zagn8n bank vs ZagChain generator

This workflow is focused on one theme only:
- comparing slow bank-style growth with the clearer ZagChain investment journey

Before activating:

1. Replace the secure feed URL if needed.
2. Replace `replace-with-your-zagn8n-token`.
3. Replace `replace-with-your-openai-api-key`.
4. Replace Telegram chat ID and Google Sheet ID.

This workflow is stronger for ads and short-form content because it stays on one angle instead of mixing many ideas.

parameters.body:
={
  "theme": "bank_vs_zagchain",

  "video_script_15s": $json.video_script_15s,

  "story_text": $json.story_text,
  "image_headline": $json.image_headline,
  "image_subheadline": $json.image_subheadline,
  "cta": $json.cta,
  "hashtags": $json.hashtags_text,
  "canva_image_brief": $json.canva_image_brief,
  "canva_video_brief": $json.canva_video_brief,
  "approval_status": "pending_review",
